issue_title: (fix) override default overlay config to disable use of top-layered popovers
issue_body_preview:
# PR

- [x] Have you followed the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/ever-co/ever-gauzy/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)?
- [x] Have you explained what your changes do, and why they add value?

**Please note: we will close your PR without comment if you do not check the boxes abov
test_description_zh: 在应用中打开包含弹出层（popover）的页面或组件，触发弹出层显示，观察其位置、层级和视觉表现是否正常
expected_result_zh: 弹出层在触发后正确显示在目标元素附近，不会因 top-layer 机制导致定位偏移、被截断或层级异常，popover 覆盖层正常覆盖在页面内容之上
